criteria.description: Both tasks/guidelines.md copies instruct repo-root-relative owned_files (the 'absolute' instruction removed), agreeing with the repo-relative ownership validator.
criteria.notes: WP01 APPROVED; red-first 5->6; terminology guard green.

criteria.description: task-prompt-template.md frontmatter declares owned_files, authoritative_surface, execution_mode, create_intent with guidance + repo-relative examples.
criteria.notes: WP01 APPROVED; template read from disk, not fabricated.

criteria.description: A WP authored verbatim from the completed template with repo-relative paths passes ownership validation + finalize first time; an absolute-path entry fails consistently.
criteria.notes: WP01 APPROVED; delete-the-validator RED case confirms the FR is genuinely tested.

criteria.description: spec-kitty specify --topology accepts the 4 canonical MissionTopology enum values, rejects others, and stores the explicit choice; coord-branch mint is conditional. Default coord.
criteria.notes: WP03 APPROVED; explicit enum stored verbatim (classify corroborates, fail-closed); 'flat' rejected exit 2; T010 coord default byte-identical.

criteria.description: A create-time single_branch mission completes the full implement + merge loop end-to-end (no coordination_branch ever written).
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/test_specify_topology_flag.py::T009 e2e (real implement x2 + real _run_lane_based_merge; four observable post-merge facts); WP03 commit 9bf529107
criteria.notes: WP03 APPROVED; e2e genuine (not stubbed); two back-to-back auto_commit=False claims exercise WP02 (red-on-revert).

criteria.description: Back-to-back auto_commit=False claims are not blocked by the first claim's vcs-lock self-write; the exclusion is lock-field-only.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_implement_vcs_lock_claim.py (e2e + negative guard + pure truth table); WP02 commit cafaf6b56
criteria.notes: WP02 APPROVED; _VCS_LOCK_META_FIELDS exactly matches set_vcs_lock keys; auto_commit=True byte-identical.

criteria.description: retrospect sources findings from traces/*.md via the existing ingestor seam (best-effort; malformed tracer does not crash).
criteria.notes: WP04 APPROVED; seam extension not fork (NFR-002).

criteria.description: The retrospect data-model gap is gated on the mission declaring domain entities (no false gap for no-entity missions; gap still reported when entities exist and data-model.md is absent).
criteria.notes: WP04 APPROVED; existing snapshot un-loosened; 9 contract re-pins preserved verbatim.

criteria.description: An advisory (non-blocking) issue-matrix lint runs at finalize-tasks, reusing the same validate_issue_matrix engine the approve gate uses.
criteria.notes: WP05 APPROVED; one engine two callers (true call-identity, no reinvention/re-export/cross-import).

criteria.description: migrate backfill-topology --mission X mutates only the target mission's meta.json; sibling missions stay byte-identical.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/migration/test_backfill_topology_mission_scope.py (non-vacuous scope regression + would-be-RED unscoped cross-check); WP06 commit e7c1ba6a6
criteria.notes: WP06 APPROVED; #2219 verified-already-fixed upstream (#2070/#1814), now guarded.
